data.content: Implementation review blocked: src/lib/terminal-manager.ts uses process.kill(pid, 0) on the group leader before the SIGKILL fallback. If the leader exits but a detached descendant remains alive, the check throws and process.kill(-pid, 'SIGKILL') is skipped, so terminate can still leave the real worker running. Please change the fallback to target the process group independently of leader liveness and add a regression test for the leader-exits-descendant-survives case.
